prompt: Tight photograph of a finished bathroom-faucet replacement in a Lawrence MA half-bath — new matte-black single-handle widespread faucet on a white-porcelain undermount basin set in a white-quartz vanity top. Crisp deck plate, no water stains, no caulk smears. Brushed-chrome pop-up drain visible. Soft daylight from a window outside the frame. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
